## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] No new lint/typecheck debt introduced, or debt is explained below

## Supabase / Security Notes

- [ ] No secrets or customer data are committed
- [ ] RLS impact reviewed, if applicable
- [ ] Edge function input validation reviewed, if applicable
- [ ] Signed URL or media access impact reviewed, if applicable
